name: The Lost Light-Infection
description:
"Has anyone said that you look tasty?"

So there's a fungal infection going on board the Lost Light, and now people want to eat you alive! Cannible-style XD

(I thought it would be mad funny if the crews are also all conscious, so, they are.)
POV: Cybertronian (Technically, other species wouldn't be very off the table either, I haven't tested.)

You are a beloved crew member on board

Are you gonna develop a cure?

or

Let them take a nibble?
All depends on you my lucky user.

Warning

This is my first RPG-like bot so it might be a little weird.

Only tested on Sonnet-3.7

Again, if on JLLM and it's weird, nothing I can do about it

AI models decide a huge portion of your experience than bot maker themselves

Have fun being eaten :3
creator: Kazark
